summary: Implemented Stage 10C Codex state reconciliation dry-run reporting with pure proposal models, deterministic proposal/finding ordering, missing-target conflict findings, empty-report findings, a codex-state-reconcile-dry-run CLI, and focused privacy/no-mutation tests.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_codex_state.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 366 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

A helper converts CodexStateObservationR.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/codex_state.py defines CodexStateReconciliationDryRunReport and build_codex_state_reconciliation_dry_run, which transform Stage 10B observations into metadata-only artifact-link, progress-event, and follow-up-finding proposals without opening planning SQLite or Codex databases.

Dry-run proposals carry source_kind, sou.evidence: CodexStateReconciliationProposal carries every required provenance field, and tests assert action_status, action_type, source provenance, linked IDs, confidence, observed_at, and raw_snapshot_hash values.

Missing linked plan/task IDs, database-u.evidence: build_codex_state_reconciliation_dry_run turns missing known plan/task targets into missing_linked_plan and missing_linked_task findings, carries database_unavailable findings from Stage 10B, and adds empty_observation_report findings for reports with no observations.

CLI JSON output emits observations, prop.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/cli.py exposes codex-state-reconcile-dry-run --json. tests/test_codex_state.py inserts private row payload values and asserts they are absent from serialized CLI output while observations, proposals, and findings are present.

Focused tests cover proposed actions, co.evidence: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_codex_state.py -q -p no:cacheprovider passed with proposed action, deterministic ordering, conflict/empty finding, Codex-home/planning-sentinel no-mutation, and CLI JSON coverage.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 10C Codex state reconciliation dry-run diff.

risks: This slice still emits dry-run proposals only; no reconciliation apply path writes planning progress or artifact links from Codex telemetry yet.
Known plan/task validation is caller-supplied so future apply tooling must source known IDs from planning SQLite deliberately and read-only before proposing writes.
Official Codex automation bridge work remains a later Stage 10 slice.
follow_up_tasks: Shape a Stage 10D reconciliation review/apply workflow that consumes dry-run proposals and writes only reviewed planning rows.
Add repeated failure summarization once safe log-summary observations exist.
Add official Codex automation tooling dry-run coverage for recurring queue reconciliation and health checks.
handoff_notes: Stage 10C adds build_codex_state_reconciliation_dry_run and the codex-state-reconcile-dry-run CLI. It converts Stage 10B observation reports into deterministic privacy-safe dry-run proposals plus reconciliation findings, while avoiding row payload output, Codex-home mutation, and planning SQLite mutation.
